name: Bagani Amihan 4T Gust
shortDesc: High mileage motorcycle engine oil for daily riders. Reliable protection for 4-stroke engines.
description: A high-quality multi-grade engine oil developed for four-stroke motorcycle engines, including both air-cooled and water-cooled systems. Advanced wear protection formulation helps maintain consistent engine protection, particularly in motorcycles operating under high power and demanding conditions.

benefits.title: Enhanced Wear Protection
benefits.desc: Helps safeguard engine components against friction and premature wear.

benefits.title: Lower Oil Consumption
benefits.desc: Supports reduced oil usage while helping maintain cleaner engine internals.

benefits.title: Cost-Effective Maintenance
benefits.desc: Helps minimize engine deposits, contributing to reduced maintenance requirements.

benefits.title: Improved Fuel Efficiency
benefits.desc: Promotes efficient engine performance and optimized fuel consumption.

applicationText: BAGANI AMIHAN 4T GUST is suitable for modern Japanese and European motorcycles. It can also be used in small four-stroke gasoline-powered equipment such as generator sets, pumps, and garden machinery.
approvalsText: This product meets the requirements of API Service Classification SG/CD.

faqs.q: Is Amihan 4T Gust good for daily commuting?
faqs.a: Yes, the Amihan 4T Gust is formulated for reliable daily performance. SAE 40 viscosity provides consistent protection across a wide range of riding conditions.

faqs.q: How often should I change the oil?
faqs.a: We recommend every 2,000–3,000 km under normal conditions, or every 1,500 km for heavy-duty use.

faqs.q: Can I use this for my generator or water pump?
faqs.a: Yes. The Amihan 4T Gust is suitable for small 4-stroke gasoline-powered equipment such as generator sets, pumps, and garden machinery.
